title: elaeoselinum tenuifolium
intro: Elaeoselinum tenuifolium, also known as tansy-leaved angelica or Chinese angelica, is a type of flowering plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Elaeoselinum tenuifolium include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism and arthritis, and supporting digestion, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. Elaeoselinum tenuifolium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for various methods of consumption and application.
